summary: The ExEx notifications divergence is formatting-only: a boolean condition is rustfmt-reflowed and early return/continue expressions gain semicolons without changing canonicality or notification behavior.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 115: M	crates/exex/exex/src/notifications.rs.
The isolated patch reflows an `&&` condition and adds semicolons to `Ok(None)`, `Err(...)`, `Poll::Ready(...)`, `continue`, and `Poll::Ready(None)` expressions.
No canonicality check, WAL recovery lookup, notification polling branch, backfill output, or stream termination behavior changed.
